title: Cliff Racer Phantom
description: changes the Phantom's model and soundsl to Cliff Racer from Morrowind (CEM Model)
body:
_Fly in the sky, so high in the sky_

## About
Phantoms and Cliff Racers are very similar: They fly and annoy. THAT's WHY I decided to replace the Phantom model with a Cliff Racer. _Now with sound~_


## Requirements

To make the resource pack work correctly you need Optifine or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

### Texture is made by Frey426 and Inferno_Artisto
This pack has 2 versions btw:
1. Main version with texture by Frey426 and Inferno_Artisto. Looks more cartoonish
2. Alt. version with texture only by Inferno. Looks more dark(??) WIP
